content_fingerprint: openai updates gpt 5 2 model reference page in april 2026 developer changelog openai revised the gpt 5 2 model reference documentation on its developer platform reflecting ongoing updates to its model lineup openai has updated the reference documentation for its gpt 5 2 model on the official developer platform according to an entry in the platform s april 2026 changelog the change logged on april 24 2026 signals that the company continues to refine documentation for its latest model tier accessible to developers via the api the updated documentation can be found at platform openai com docs mod
